summary: Work Readiness Filter and Expiry Tracking features fully tested and verified. All features working correctly: Work Readiness filter dropdown on Employees list filters correctly (Work Ready shows only Olakunle, Not Ready shows Lawrence and others, All Readiness shows all). Expiry tracking shows '1 expired' indicator on Lawrence's row. Lawrence's profile shows Compliance Alerts panel with '1 item expired' (Health & Safety Training expired 383 days ago). Olakunle's profile shows 'Work Ready' status with no expiry alerts.
passed_tests: ✅ Employees list has 'Work Readiness' filter dropdown - SUCCESS
✅ 'Work Ready' filter shows only Olakunle Alonge - SUCCESS
✅ 'Not Ready' filter shows Lawrence Egbeni and others - SUCCESS
✅ 'All Readiness' filter shows all employees - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence Egbeni row shows '1 expired' indicator in Compliance column - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence Egbeni profile - Compliance Alerts panel shows '1 item expired' - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence Egbeni profile - Health & Safety Training listed as expired (383 days ago) - SUCCESS
✅ Lawrence Egbeni profile - What's Needed tab shows 'Expired 2025-03-11' badge on Health & Safety Training row - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle Alonge profile - Work Readiness panel shows 'Work Ready' status - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle Alonge profile - Shows 'All mandatory items are verified. This employee can start work.' - SUCCESS
✅ Olakunle Alonge profile - No Compliance Alerts panel (expected for Work Ready employee) - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Olakunle Alonge (OCS-0001, ID: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77) is Work Ready, Lawrence Egbeni (OCS-0002, ID: ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf) is Not Ready with 1 expired item (Health & Safety Training expired 2025-03-11)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Readiness Filter and Expiry Tracking features fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) Work Readiness filter dropdown on Employees list with options: All Readiness, Work Ready, Almost Ready, Not Ready - client-side filtering works correctly, (2) Expiry indicator ('1 expired') shown on employee rows in Compliance column, (3) Compliance Alerts panel on employee profile What's Needed tab showing expired items with days since expiry, (4) Expired status badges on requirement rows showing expiry date. Employee IDs: Olakunle=d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Work Ready), Lawrence=ccfcbdbb-feda-4043-a8b2-2f1f9da88bdf (Not Ready, 1 expired).
